title: Bind release metadata to final merge tree
rawUserRequest: 继续完成 v0.5.39 发布；按最终默认分支合并树重新绑定发布归档摘要，并完成完整 PR、合并、清理和默认分支同步流程。

declaredIntent.summary: 重新计算最终合并提交源树的 release archive digest，并同步其元数据摘要。

outOfScope: Changing archive encoding or release workflow logic.
Publishing a tag before lifecycle closure.

riskAssessment.reason: Bounded metadata-only update against the final merge tree.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized completion of release publication.

preReviewWarnings: Digest must be computed from the exact merge commit tree used by the provider.
acceptance: release.json archive digest matches the exact c0fc merge-tree archive.
release-state.json and release-digests.json match the resulting release.json digest.
Finish Gate, PR checks, merge, closure, and default-branch synchronization complete before retrying publication.
guidelines: Do not publish before lifecycle closure.

intent.problem: The first retry reached source-bound evidence generation but failed because the merge commit tree differed from the pre-merge PR tree used to calculate release.json.
intent.rationale: Bind metadata to the actual provider checkout commit, then retry only after the full Work Item lifecycle.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The exact merge commit tree produces the committed release archive digest.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan and publication.

rollbackNote: Restore release metadata to the previous merge-tree binding.
